message:
feat(lab,messaging,web): generation-aware snapshot restore, queue-cursor fairness, Redis protocol limits, and web extraction hardening

src/lab/snapshot_restore.rs (+281/-):
- Replace index-only referential integrity checks with generation-aware
  SnapshotIdKey that includes both slot index and generation, preventing
  stale slot reuse from passing validation after arena reclamation
- Add region_slots secondary index for slot-level duplicate detection
- Add task-region cross-reference validation using generation-aware keys
- Expand obligation validation to verify task and region references
  against generation-keyed sets instead of bare slot indices
- Add comprehensive tests: stale-generation rejection, cross-reference
  mismatch detection, duplicate slot detection

src/messaging/subject.rs (+239):
- Replace global queue-group round-robin cursor keyed by group name
  with QueueCursorKey keyed by (group, sorted member set), preventing
  unrelated delivery sets sharing a group name from perturbing each
  other's fairness state
- Invalidate stale cursor state on subscription mutation (insert/remove)
  before readers observe the new trie topology
- Add tests: independent fairness per delivery set, cursor invalidation
  on member change, deterministic ordering with stable member sets

src/messaging/redis.rs (+124):
- Extract protocol limits from hardcoded constants into configurable
  RedisProtocolLimits struct (max_nesting_depth, max_bulk_string_len,
  max_array_elements)
- Thread limits through try_decode_with_limits() and all decode_at()
  call sites
- Add bulk string length validation before allocation
- Add array element count validation before Vec::with_capacity
- Add tests: limits enforcement, default limits match prior behavior

src/web/extract.rs (+90):
- Add content-type validation for JSON extraction with structured error
- Add request body size limit enforcement
- Add tests for oversized body rejection and wrong content-type

src/web/multipart.rs (+124):
- Add per-field size limit enforcement during multipart parsing
- Add total upload size tracking across all fields
- Add tests for field-level and total-level size limit violations

src/web/static_files.rs (+19):
- Add path traversal guard for static file serving

tests/notify_bug.rs + tests/partialeq_test.rs:
- Minor test fixture alignment

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
